terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: Dames.com is an online gaming platform developed as part of the ft_transcendence project at 42 school. This site is an educational project with no commercial purpose.
terms.s2_body: Registration requires a unique username and a valid email address, or a login via 42 authentication (OAuth). You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential.
terms.s3_li2: Cheating is prohibited (bots, automated scripts, exploits)
terms.s4_body: You can delete your account at any time from your profile page. This action removes your personal data in accordance with our privacy policy.
terms.s5_body: As this project is made for educational purposes, no guarantee of availability, performance, or absence of bugs is provided.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_intro: When you register and use Dames.com, we collect:
privacy.s1_li3: Your game history and play statistics
privacy.s1_li4: Your authentication data (via the 42 API if OAuth login)
privacy.s2_intro: This data is used only to:
privacy.s2_li1: Let you play and track your statistics
privacy.s2_li2: Manage your account and session (via cookies/JWT tokens)
privacy.s2_li3: Display your profile to other players
privacy.s3_body: We use technical cookies (session, authentication) necessary for the site to function. No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.
privacy.s4_body: Your data is never sold or shared with third parties for commercial purposes. It remains strictly internal to the application.
privacy.s5_body: In accordance with GDPR, you can at any time request access, modification, or deletion of your personal data by deleting your account from your profile, or by contacting us.
privacy.s6_body: For any question about your data, contact the development team via the project repository.
